jobs.title: Music Production & Sound Design Instructor
jobs.description:
**Music Production \& Sound Design Instructor**

**Part\-Time \| After\-School Hours**

**Sound Club – Creative Music Studio**

**About Sound Club**

Sound Club is a creative music studio dedicated to inspiring the next generation of musicians, producers, and creators. We offer hands\-on programs in music production, sound design, DJing, podcasting, and digital media for students ages 8–16\. Our mission is to combine creativity with technology in a fun, engaging, and supportive learning environment.

**Position Overview**

We are seeking an enthusiastic and experienced **Music Production \& Sound Design Instructor** to teach students ages 8–16\. The ideal candidate has a strong background in both music production and sound design, is proficient in **Logic Pro**and **GarageBand**, and enjoys inspiring young learners through creative, project\-based instruction.

This instructor will teach students how to create original music while also exploring sound effects, Foley, recording techniques, and audio production used in film, games, and digital media.

**Responsibilities**

* Teach music production using Logic Pro and GarageBand
* Instruct students in beat\-making, songwriting, recording, arranging, editing, and basic mixing
* Teach sound design and Foley techniques, including recording, creating, layering, and editing sound effects
* Guide students through creative audio projects for music, video, podcasts, games, and storytelling
* Adapt lessons to different ages and skill levels (ages 8–16\)
* Foster a fun, supportive, structured, and inclusive classroom environment
* Encourage creativity, collaboration, and critical listening skills
* Track student progress and provide constructive feedback
* Prepare students for showcases, presentations, or creative projects
* Maintain studio equipment, recording gear, computers, and software
* Troubleshoot basic technical issues and ensure equipment is organized and functioning properly

**Qualifications**

* Strong proficiency in **Logic Pro** and **GarageBand**
* Experience in music production, recording, composition, or audio engineering
* Experience in sound design, Foley, or audio post\-production
* Understanding of recording studio workflow and audio signal flow
* Familiarity with microphones, audio interfaces, MIDI controllers, and recording equipment
* Knowledge of audio plugins, virtual instruments, and mixing fundamentals
* Ability to explain technical concepts in a simple, engaging, and age\-appropriate way
* Experience teaching or mentoring children or teens is preferred
* Patient, reliable, organized, and enthusiastic about music education
* Excellent communication and classroom management skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Background in film audio, multimedia, game audio, podcast production, or audio engineering
* Experience creating sound effects for film, animation, video games, or digital media
* Experience developing engaging, project\-based lesson plans
* Multi\-instrumental or songwriting experience is a plus

**Why Join Sound Club?**

* Inspire the next generation of music producers and sound designers
* Teach in a professional, technology\-driven creative studio
* Work with high\-end music production and recording equipment
* Be part of a growing and innovative educational program
* Opportunity to contribute your own creative ideas and curriculum
* Flexible part\-time after\-school schedule

**Schedule**

* Part\-Time
* Primarily Monday–Thursday after\-school hours, with occasional Saturday classes or special events.

If you're passionate about music production, sound design, and inspiring young creators, we'd love to hear from you!

Pay: $30\.00 per hour

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule

Work Location: In person
